name: Sublease Agreement
description: A contract allowing a current tenant to rent out their leased property or a room to a third-party subtenant.
content:
SUBLEASE AGREEMENT

1. THE PARTIES:
Sublessor (Original Tenant): {{sublessor_name}} (ID/SSN: {{sublessor_id}})
Sublessee (New Tenant): {{sublessee_name}} (ID/SSN: {{sublessee_id}})

2. PREMISES: The Sublessor agrees to sublet, and the Sublessee agrees to rent, the premises located at: {{property_address}}.

3. SUBLEASE TERMS:

  • Monthly Rent: {{monthly_rent}}
  • Commencement Date: {{formatDate start_date}}
  • Duration: {{lease_duration_months}} Months
  • Security Deposit: {{security_deposit}}

4. MASTER LEASE COMPLIANCE & SPECIAL PROVISIONS:

{{special_provisions}}

The Sublessee acknowledges that this Agreement is subject to the terms and conditions of the Master Lease between the Sublessor and the Landlord. The Sublessee agrees to comply with all obligations of the Master Lease. The written consent of the Landlord is required for this Sublease Agreement to be fully valid and enforceable.

Sublessor

{{sublessor_name}}


Signature: ________________

Sublessee

{{sublessee_name}}


Signature: ________________

fields.name: special_provisions
fields.label: Special Provisions
fields.placeholder: e.g., Utilities are split 50/50, No pets allowed.
